title: Fluffy Festive Mediterranean Coconut Bake
description: A flavorful and fluffy vegetarian bake that combines the warmth of Mediterranean spices with the sweetness of coconut. This festive dish is perfect for a special occasion or holiday gathering.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C) and grease a 9x13-inch baking dish with olive oil.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the unsweetened coconut milk, shredded coconut, honey, olive oil, dried oregano, dried thyme, and crushed feta cheese. Stir until well combined.
Add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined. Do not overmix.
Fold in the chopped fresh parsley and orange zest.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
